title: codereview-pass1: pseudocode at spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:45 uses non-pure syntax
description: Pseudocode references appendix C-style fnv1a32 with language-specific operators. Must convert to pure IETF-style pseudocode without 'or', '||', types, or Rust/Python keywords. Add definitions for select_channel() and now(). Update TOC, add full SF function in new subsection 2a.7 per 8gac. Language agnostic, IETF style, no dead code. Update appendix rationale for density vs SF10 baseline.
